creator: hsu@clinet.fi
text:
Processes don't seem to get more than 4M of memory, ever, causing 64M
machine swap wildly where is still plenty of memory available.
Harvest cached seems to be a good program to demonstrate this.

How-To-Repeat: 
Run harvest cache.  Innd also uses lots of memory but apparently does
not access it as randomly as harvest cached does.
